hero.headline: I design & build web products teams
hero.lead: A BSc IT and {years} years shipping production apps end to end — from SaaS platforms to e-commerce — with Nuxt, Next.js and TypeScript.

companies.heading: Some Of The Awesome Companies That I Have Worked With

about.headline: Building the web,
paragraphs: Fueled by a passion for technology and a knack for problem-solving, I'm a web developer with a drive to craft intuitive and impactful web experiences.

My journey began in the dynamic world of retail, where I honed my leadership and customer-centric skills as a Branch Manager. While exceeding sales targets and building a thriving team, I discovered a passion for web development — which led me to a Bachelor's degree in Information Technology, graduating in 2021 with a comprehensive understanding of web principles.
Since then I've shipped production apps end to end — from SaaS platforms to e-commerce — for agencies, trading companies and my own clients through EZdev Solutions.
